title: Lexell Coir Matting for Entrance Heavy Duty Coir Door Mats Indoor Outdoor - Non-Slip Rubber Back with Thick Natural Bristle (40 x 60 cm)
features: 𝗣𝗿𝗲𝗺𝗶𝘂𝗺 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: Our coir door mats are made from natural coir fibers, ensuring long-lasting performance. This door mat is excellent at trapping dirt, dust and moisture while also looking chic.
𝗪𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗿 𝗥𝗲𝘀𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗻𝘁: The fibers of a coir mat are naturally resistant to weather, making it perfect for indoor & outdoor use. We bring the perfect coir matting for your door!

𝗡𝗼𝗻-𝗦𝗹𝗶𝗽 𝗕𝗮𝗰𝗸𝗶𝗻𝗴: Our door mats outdoor feature a PVC backing which helps your mat stay securely in place which means no more falls! This outdoor door mat is ideal for high-traffic areas in your home or office.

𝗪𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗼𝗳 & 𝗪𝗮𝘀𝗵𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲: This outside door mat can be placed without worrying about the dust or moisture that attacks the mat! This front door mat outside is waterproof as well as washable, making your life easier.

𝗩𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 & 𝗦𝘁𝘆𝗹𝗲: Our outdoor front door mats come in a variety of sizes and colours, allowing you to have a hassle-free shopping experience. This coconut matting door mat looks stunning while also making sure the purpose is served.
